\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
PMCHWT formulation for SIE in homogeneous and layered media. 

Uses RWG basis/testing and Green\textquotesingle{}s function back-\/ends (homogeneous and optionally layered) to assemble the block matrix\+:

\[\begin{bmatrix}
\mathrm{j}\,\omega\,\mu\,\mathbf{D} & \,\mathbf{K} \\
-\,\mathbf{K} & \mathrm{j}\,\omega\,\varepsilon\,\mathbf{D}
\end{bmatrix}
\begin{bmatrix}
\mathbf{J} \\[2pt] \mathbf{M}
\end{bmatrix}
=
\begin{bmatrix}
\mathbf{q}^\mathbf{E}_{\mathrm{inc}} \\[2pt] \mathbf{q}^\mathbf{H}_{\mathrm{inc}}
\end{bmatrix},
\]

where blocks are populated by double-\/surface integrals of Green kernels and their curls/gradients, evaluated with RWG functions on mesh triangles. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEFormPMCHW_8h_source_l00051}{51}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SIEFormPMCHW_8h_source}{SIEForm\+PMCHW.\+h}}.

{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classSIEFormPMCHW_a65dca87d3c16fbf2c82200d597e18417} 
int SIEForm\+PMCHW\+::\+Fill\+LSEMatrix (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{blitz\+::\+Array$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}, 2 $>$ \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{lse\+Matrix}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [virtual]}}



Assemble the PMCHWT system matrix for a homogeneous/layered medium. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em lse\+Matrix} & Output A (2Nx2N). Caller must size appropriately. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Partitions RWGs by owner triangle, spawns (threads-\/1) workers plus the current thread to call Fill\+LSEMatrix\+Parallel. Uses per-\/row mutexes to update matrix blocks safely. 

Implements \mbox{\hyperlink{classSIEForm_adb9adfe191240392dec2e902810f64d7}{SIEForm}}.

Assemble A and its gradients w.\+r.\+t. 

3 geometry params (homogeneous). 
\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em lse\+Matrix} & Output A. \\
\hline
{\em lse\+Gradient\+Matrix} & Array of 3 gradient matrices. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
0 on success.
\end{DoxyReturn}
Triangles are grouped, and workers call Fill\+LSEMatrix\+And\+Gradient\+Parallel. Gradient contributions are computed only for boundary-\/type pairs that cross the 0–1 interface (as per existing code logic).

Layer index in \mbox{[}0...N\mbox{]}, using \doxylink{classSIEFormPMCHW_a905a0dbdfbcdecabe5c9ca04c2a41233}{z\+Vals\+Interfaces} with tolerance.

Indexing convention\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item 0 \+: below the first interface
\item 1..N-\/1 \+: between interfaces i-\/1 and i
\item N \+: above the last interface with a small tolerance on comparisons. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
